snippet.title: Chan Chun Sing on whether he is next in line to be Singapore's prime minister
snippet.description:
With DPM Heng Swee Keat having taken himself out of the running as Singapore's prime minister, his deputy, Chan Chun Sing, was asked if he was next in line.

"Now that DPM has decided to step aside as leader of the 4G, the 4G team should be given the opportunity to relook the question of succession holistically, and we will make a collective decision on who will be the next leader of the 4G in due course," Mr Chan said in response. https://cna.asia/3uvIZAq

snippet.title: Army of the Dead | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
In Select Theaters May and on Netflix May 21.

From filmmaker Zack Snyder (300, Watchmen, Zack SnyderвҖҷs Justice League), ARMY OF THE DEAD takes place following a zombie outbreak that has left Las Vegas in ruins and walled off from the rest of the world. When Scott Ward (Dave Bautista), a former zombie war hero whoвҖҷs now flipping burgers on the outskirts of the town he now calls home, is approached by casino boss Bly Tanaka (Hiroyuki Sanada), itвҖҷs with the ultimate proposition: break into the zombie-infested quarantine zone to retrieve $200 million sitting in a vault beneath the strip before the city is nuked by the government in 32 hours. With little left to lose, Ward takes on the challenge, assembling a ragtag team of experts for the heist. With a ticking clock, a notoriously impenetrable vault, and a smarter, faster horde of Alpha zombies closing in, only one thingвҖҷs for certain in the greatest heist ever attempted: survivors take all.

Starring Dave Bautista, Ella Purnell, Omari Hardwick, Ana de la Reguera, Theo Rossi, Matthias SchweighГ¶fer, Nora Arnezeder, Hiroyuki Sanada, Tig Notaro, RaГәl Castillo, Huma Qureshi, Samantha Win, Michael Cassidy, Richard Cetrone, and Garret Dillahunt.

SUBSCRIBE: http://bit.ly/29qBUt7

About Netflix:
Netflix is the world's leading streaming entertainment service with 204 million paid memberships in over 190 countries enjoying TV series, documentaries and feature films across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can watch as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, on any internet-connected screen. Members can play, pause and resume watching, all without commercials or commitments.

Army of the Dead | Official Trailer | Netflix 
https://youtube.com/Netflix

After a zombie outbreak in Las Vegas, a group of mercenaries takes the ultimate gamble by venturing into the quarantine zone for the greatest heist ever.

snippet.title: Taylor Swift - Mr. Perfectly Fine (TaylorвҖҷs Version) (From The Vault) (Lyric Video)
snippet.description:
Official lyric video for вҖңMr. Perfectly FineвҖқ (TaylorвҖҷs Version) (From The Vault) вҖ“ off her upcoming Fearless (TaylorвҖҷs Version) album. Get the album here: https://taylor.lnk.to/fearlesstaylorsversion. Get the song here: https://taylor.lnk.to/mpf

в–әSubscribe to Taylor Swift on YouTube: https://ts.lnk.to/subscribe 
 
в–әExclusive Merch: http://taylorswift.lnk.to/store

в–әFollow Taylor Swift online:
Instagram: http://instagram.com/taylorswift  
Facebook: http://facebook.com/taylorswift  
Tumblr: http://taylorswift.tumblr.com  
Twitter: http://twitter.com/taylorswift13  
Snapchat: http://snapchat.com/add/taylorswift
Website: http://www.taylorswift.com  

в–әFollow Taylor Nation Online
Instagram: http://instagram.com/taylornation  
Tumblr: http://taylornation.tumblr.com  
Twitter: http://twitter.com/taylornation13
TikTok: http://tiktok.com/@taylornation

Official Lyrics:
 
Mr. perfect face
Mr. here to stay
Mr. looked me in the eye and told me you would never go away
Everything was right
Mr. IвҖҷve been waiting for you all my life
Mr. every single day until the end I will be by your side
But that was when I got to know
Mr. change of heart
Mr. leaves me all alone
I fall apart
It takes everything in me just to get up each day
But itвҖҷs wonderful to see that youвҖҷre okay

Hello, Mr. perfectly fine
HowвҖҷs your heart after breaking mine?
Mr. always at the right place at the right time, baby
Hello, Mr. casually cruel
Mr. everything revolves around you
IвҖҷve been Miss misery since your goodbye
And youвҖҷre Mr. perfectly fine

Mr. never told me why
Mr. never had to see me cry
Mr. insincere apology so he doesnвҖҷt look like the bad guy
He goes about his day
Forgets he ever even heard my name
Well I thought you might be different than the rest
I guess youвҖҷre all the same
Because I hear heвҖҷs got his arm вҖҳround a brand new girl
IвҖҷve been picking up my heart
HeвҖҷs been picking up her
And I never got past what you put me through
But itвҖҷs wonderful to see that it never phased you

Repeat chorus

So dignified in your well pressed suit
So strategized
All the eyes on you
Sashay your way to your seat
ItвҖҷs the best seat
In the best room
Oh, heвҖҷs so smug
Mr. always wins
So far above me in every sense
So far above feeling anything

And itвҖҷs really such a shame
ItвҖҷs such a shame
Cause I was Miss here to stay
Now IвҖҷm Miss gonna be alright someday
And someday maybe youвҖҷll miss me
But by then youвҖҷll be Mr. too late

Goodbye, Mr. perfectly fine
HowвҖҷs your heart after breaking mine?
Mr. always at the right place at the right time, baby
Goodbye, Mr. casually cruel
Mr. everything revolves around you
IвҖҷve been Miss misery for the last time
And youвҖҷre Mr. perfectly fine
YouвҖҷre perfectly fine
Mr. look me in the eye and tell me you

#taylorswift #mrperfectlyfine #fromthevault #fearlesstaylorsversion

snippet.title: Taylor Swift - You Belong With Me (Taylor's Version) (Lyric Video)
snippet.description:
Official lyric video for вҖңYou Belong With MeвҖқ (TaylorвҖҷs Version) вҖ“ off her Fearless (TaylorвҖҷs Version) album. Get the album here: https://taylor.lnk.to/fearlesstaylorsversion. 

в–әSubscribe to Taylor Swift on YouTube: https://ts.lnk.to/subscribe

Official Lyrics:
 
YouвҖҷre on the phone with your girlfriend 
SheвҖҷs upset, sheвҖҷs going off about something that you said 
Cause she doesnвҖҷt get your humor like I do 

IвҖҷm in my room itвҖҷs a typical Tuesday night
IвҖҷm listening to the kind of music she doesnвҖҷt like 
And sheвҖҷll never know your story like I do 

Cause she wears short skirts, I wear t-shirts 
SheвҖҷs cheer captain and IвҖҷm on the bleachers 
Dreaming вҖҳbout the day when you wake up and find 
That what youвҖҷre looking for has been here the whole time 

If you could see that IвҖҷm the one who understands you 
Been here all along so why canвҖҷt you see 
You belong with me
 You belong with me 

Walk in the streets with you in your worn out jeans 
I canвҖҷt help thinking this is how it ought to be 
Laughing on a park bench thinking to myself, hey isnвҖҷt this easy 

And youвҖҷve got a smile that could light up this whole town 
I havenвҖҷt seen it in a while since she brought you down 
You say youвҖҷre fine I know you better than that 
Hey what you doing with a girl like that 

She wears high heels, I wear sneakers 
SheвҖҷs cheer captain and IвҖҷm on the bleachers 
Dreaming вҖҳbout the day when you wake up and find 
That what youвҖҷre looking for has been here the whole time 

If you could see that IвҖҷm the one who understands you 
Been here all along so why canвҖҷt you see 
You belong with me 
Standing by waiting at your back door 
All this time how could you not know baby 
You belong with me 
You belong with me 

Oh I remember you driving to my house in the middle of the night 
IвҖҷm the one who makes you laugh when you know youвҖҷre вҖҳbout to cry 
I know your favorite songs and you tell me about your dreams 
I think I know where you belong, I think I know itвҖҷs with me 

CanвҖҷt you see that IвҖҷm the one who understands you 
Been here all along so why canвҖҷt you see 
You belong with me 
Standing by waiting at your back door 
All this time how could you not know baby 
You belong with me 
You belong with me 
You belong with me 
Have you ever thought just maybe 
You belong with me 
You belong with me

Been here all along so why canвҖҷt you see

Oh I remember you driving to my house in the middle of the night

snippet.title: Singapore leadership succession: Heng Swee Keat explains why he is stepping down as 4G team leader
snippet.description:
Singapore Deputy Prime Minister Heng Swee Keat will step aside as the leader of the fourth-generation People's Action Party (PAP) leadership team, taking himself out of running as Singapore's next prime minister, he announced on Thursday (Apr 8).

Noting that he would be in his mid-60s by the time the COVID-19 crisis is over, Mr Heng said: "While I am in good health today, it is in the best interests of the nation for someone who is younger to tackle the huge challenges ahead." https://cna.asia/3wLKhJJ

й§җзҫҺд»ЈиЎЁи•ӯзҫҺзҗҙж—ҘеүҚеңЁиҸҜеәңйӣҷж©Ўең’иЎЁзӨәпјҢзҫҺж–№йқһеёёй—ңеҲҮзҫҺиұ¬е…¬жҠ•пјҢиӢҘе…¬жҠ•йҖҡйҒҺпјҢе°Үжңғе°ҚеҸ°зҫҺиІҝжҳ“её¶дҫҶйўЁйҡӘе’ҢдёҚзўәе®ҡеӣ зҙ гҖӮеңӢж°‘й»Ёй»Ёз«Ӣе§”жқҺиІҙж•Ҹ12ж—ҘиіӘи©ўеӨ–дәӨйғЁж¬Ўй•·з”°дёӯе…үпјҢи©ўе•ҸеҸҚиҗҠиұ¬е…¬жҠ•жҳҜеҗҰеҰӮи•ӯжүҖиЁҖжңғеҪұйҹҝеҸ°зҫҺзҡ„иІҝжҳ“й—ңдҝӮпјҹз”°еқҰиЁҖпјҢе…¬жҠ•жҳҜжҶІжі•иіҰдәҲдәәж°‘зҡ„ж¬ҠеҲ©пјҢж—ўз„¶иҗҠиұ¬дёҚзӯүж–јзҫҺиұ¬пјҢйӮЈйәје…¬жҠ•гҖҢжҮүи©ІдёҚиҮіж–јгҖҚеҪұйҹҝйӣҷйӮҠй—ңдҝӮгҖӮ

snippet.title: Singaporeans Try: Living Off Daiso Products For 72 Hours
snippet.description:

snippet.title: гҖҗTHIRD STAGEгҖ‘'Push No.5 for Cute in Input Method' Say Sweet~гҖҠиҫ“е…Ҙжі•жү“еҸҜзҲұжҢүз¬¬дә”гҖӢи®ІиҜүдәҶдёҖеңәи¶…жөӘжј«зҡ„йӮӮйҖ…~| еҲӣйҖ иҗҘ CHUANG2021
snippet.description:
CHUANG 2021, produced by Tencent Video, is a variety show of an international boy group formation. It is dedicated to fully showing the stage performance, vigour and persistence of youngsters of new times. Nearly a hundred boys from various countries, agencies and colleges, with the help of outstanding seniors, will be together to make cultural and professional exchanges, improve themselves by rising to the challenge, explore their true self and chase their dreams zealously.

гҖҠеҲӣйҖ иҗҘ2021гҖӢжҳҜз”ұи…ҫи®Ҝи§Ҷйў‘еҮәе“Ғзҡ„еӣҪйҷ…йқ’е№ҙж–ҮеҢ–дәӨжөҒз”·еӣўжҲҗй•ҝз»јиүәпјҢиҮҙеҠӣдәҺе……еҲҶеұ•зҺ°ж–°ж—¶д»ЈеӣҪйҷ…йқ’е№ҙдәәзҡ„йҹід№җиҲһеҸ°иЎЁзҺ°еҠӣгҖҒйқ’жҳҘжҙ»еҠӣе’ҢжӢјжҗҸеҗ‘дёҠеҠӣгҖӮиҠӮзӣ®еҸ¬йӣҶжқҘиҮӘдёҚеҗҢеӣҪе®¶гҖҒдёҚеҗҢз»ҸзәӘе…¬еҸёе’Ңйҷўж Ўзҡ„иҝ‘зҷҫеҗҚеӯҰе‘ҳпјҢеңЁеӨҡдҪҚжҰңж ·еүҚиҫҲзҡ„еј•йўҶгҖҒеҠ©еҠӣгҖҒйҷӘдјҙдёӢдёҖеҗҢиҝӣиЎҢж–ҮеҢ–дёҺдё“дёҡдәӨжөҒгҖҒжү“з ҙйҮҚз»„иҝҺжҺҘжҢ‘жҲҳпјҢдёҖеҗҢжҺўзҙўзңҹжҲ‘зғӯиЎҖиҝҪжўҰгҖӮ

snippet.title: Highlights | Manchester City 1-2 Leeds United | Premier League
snippet.description:
Manchester City lost for only the fourth time this season as Stuart DallasвҖҷ stoppage time winner ensured 10-man Leeds United stunned the Premier League leaders at the Etihad Stadium.

Dallas gave Marcelo BielsaвҖҷs side the lead against the run of play when he fired a low 18-yard drive in off the post shortly before half-time, but the game appeared to swing back in CityвҖҷs favour when Liam Cooper was dismissed for a reckless tackle on Gabriel Jesus in first half added time.

Pep GuardiolaвҖҷs men were in total control after the break as Leeds tried to protect their lead, but Ferran Torres looked to have rescued a point when he steered Bernardo SilvaвҖҷs pass into the bottom corner in the 76th minute.

City continued to pour forward in search of a winner, but were undone by a slick counter-attack when Dallas latched onto Ezgjan AlioskiвҖҷs through ball and nutmegged Ederson to seal a smash and grab victory in the 91st minute.

The defeat leaves GuardiolaвҖҷs men needing 11-points from our remaining six league games to be crowned champions.

snippet.title: Queen Returns to Royal Duties Days After Duke of Edinburgh's Death
snippet.description:
'Queen Returns to Royal Duties Days After Duke of Edinburgh's Death'

The Queen has returned to royal duties, just a few days after the death of the Duke of Edinburgh.

The monarch hosted a ceremony to mark the retirement of her householdвҖҷs most senior official, the Earl Peel.

The Lord Chamberlain oversees all senior appointments in the household.

The engagement was recorded in the Court Circular вҖ“ a daily list of the events attended by the Royal Family.

The royals are observing two weeks of royal mourning, with members of the family continuing вҖңappropriateвҖқ engagements. 

Returning to her official role so soon after her bereavement typifies the QueenвҖҷs deep sense of duty.

#TheQueen #PrincePhilip #RoyalFamily

snippet.title: Introducing Pushpa Raj | Allu Arjun | Pushpa | Rashmika | Fahadh Faasil | DSP | Sukumar
snippet.description:
Introducing Pushpa Raj on Mythri Movie Makers. Written and Directed by Sukumar. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y. Ravi Shankar of Mythri Movie Makers in association with Muttamsetty Media, the film stars Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil and Rashmika Mandanna, Dhanunjay, Rao Ramesh & Ajay Ghosh
a
The film's music is composed by Devi Sri Prasad, with cinematography and editing were performed by Miroslaw Kuba Brozek and Karthika Srinivas respectively. The film is scheduled to release on 13 August 2021, in Telugu along with dubbed versions in Malayalam, Tamil, Hindi and Kannada languages.

#PushpaвҖӢ #IntroducingPushpaRaj #AlluArjunвҖӢ #PushpaTeaser #PreludeOfPushparaj #RashmikaвҖӢ #Faasil #SukumarвҖӢ #DSP #MythriMovieMakersвҖӢ 

Directed by Sukumar
Produced by Naveen Yerneni, Y. Ravi Shankar
Starring: Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil, Rashmika Mandanna
Music by Devi Sri Prasad
Cinematography: Miroslaw Kuba Brozek
Edited by Karthika Srinivas
Production Companies: Mythri Movie Makers, Muttamsetty Media
Release Date:13 August 2021

snippet.title: The life of the super-rich in Central Africa | DW Documentary
snippet.description:
Many millionaires live in the Democratic Republic of Congo, one of the world's poorest countries. This film depicts some of those who have made fortunes amid the chaos, including musicians, mining bosses, entrepreneurs and preachers.

The DRC is rich in raw materials, but only a few profit from its natural resources. While 60% of Congo's inhabitants live on less than $1.25 per day, businessmen, artists, former rebel leaders and evangelists are reaping the rewards of economic growth. In the capital, Kinshasa, these new rich live in safe and luxurious enclaves, while children toil in coltan mines in the eastern part of the country.
Fally Ipupa has made his money with music. Others rely on their business acumen, like Patricia Nzolantima, who founded a taxi company and aims to give more opportunities to women.
With 3,000 mine workers, Cooperamma is the largest employer in North Kivu, in the east of the DRC. Managing director Robert Seninga says his coltan mines are extremely well-run, yet safety standards are poor. Coltan, a globally coveted mineral, is used in cell phones and other devices. ItвҖҷs both a blessing and a curse for the Congo. It makes some rich, but for others it means death. The region still suffers from ethnic and factional conflicts, with money from illegal coltan smuggling financing new violence. ItвҖҷs a vicious cycle.

ЩҖЩҖЩҖЩҖЩҖ

snippet.title: иіҪйҰ¬зӣҙж’ӯпҪң2021-04-14 з«¶йҰ¬Fact Check Liveзӣҙж’ӯд№қе ҙHKJCйҰҷжёҜиіҪйҰ¬жңғеҝ«жҙ»и°·иҚүең°еӨңйҰ¬ еҚіе ҙиІјеЈ« AIжЁЎж“¬иіҪжһң жҺ’йҡҠйҰ¬ иҳӢжһңж—Ҙе ұ Apple Daily
snippet.description:
и·‘йҰ¬ең°йҰ¬е ҙд»ҠжҷҡпјҲ14ж—ҘпјүдёҠжј”д№қе ҙиіҪдәӢпјҢй ӯе ҙе®ҡж–јеӮҚжҷҡ6жҷӮ45еҲҶй–Ӣи·‘гҖӮ

е‘ЁеӣӣпјҲ15ж—ҘпјүжҳҜе‘ЁдҝҠжЁӮ21жӯІз”ҹж—ҘпјҢзҚІеё«еӮіжҸҗдҫӣдёҚе°‘еҜҰеҠӣеә§йЁҺпјҢдё”зңӢиғҪеҗҰиҙҸйҰ¬жҸҗеүҚиіҖеЈҪпјӣеҸҰеӨ–еӣӣеӨ§иҸҜеҖүеҫҗйӣЁзҹігҖҒж–Үе®¶иүҜгҖҒе‘ӮеҒҘеЁҒеҸҠзҫ…еҜҢе…Ёиҝ‘жңҹжҲ°зёҫеҪӘзӮідёҚеҒңиҙҸйҰ¬пјҢд»ҠжңҹеҠӣзҲӯе»¶зәҢеӢқзәңгҖӮ

иҳӢжһңгҖҠз«¶йҰ¬Fact CheckгҖӢеұҶжҷӮзӣҙж’ӯеҗ„е ҙиіҪдәӢпјҢи®“йҰ¬иҝ·зҢ¶еҰӮзҪ®иә«е ҙе…§зқҮи·‘йҰ¬гҖӮ

дё»жҢҒжңғеҲҶжһҗеҗ„е»җжҲ°йҰ¬ж©ҹжңғпјҢй…ҚеҗҲеҗ„е ҙйҰ¬еҢ№иіҪзёҫгҖҒй«”йҮҚи®ҠеҢ–гҖҒдәәйҰ¬еҗҲдҪңзӯүзөұиЁҲиіҮж–ҷпјҢдёҖиЎЁзқҮжҷ’пјҢж–№дҫҝеҲЁйҰ¬гҖӮ

гҖҠз«¶йҰ¬Fact CheckгҖӢд»ҠеӯЈж–°еўһAIжЁЎж“¬иіҪжһңпјҢйӣҶеҗ„й …dataйҖІиЎҢйҒӢз®—пјҢиӯҳеҲҘеҮәе“ӘдәӣжҳҜж©ҹжңғйҰ¬пјҢд»Ҙеҫ—еҲҶй«ҳдҪҺжҺ’еәҸпјҢдёҖзӣ®дәҶз„¶пјҒ

дё»жҢҒдәҰжңғеҚіе ҙи§Јзӯ”и®ҖиҖ…з•ҷиЁҖпјҢиҲҮи®ҖиҖ…дә’еӢ•дәӨжөҒпјӣеҸҰеӨ–жңғеҠ жҸ’йЁҺз·ҙиіҪеүҚиЁӘе•ҸпјҢеӨ§е®¶жҲ–иҖ…еҫһдёӯеҸҜд»ҘжҗөеҲ°ж–№еҗ‘гҖӮ

жӯӨеӨ–пјҢеҮәй–ҳй җжё¬иө°дҪҚең–з•Җи§ҖзңҫдәҶи§Јд»Ҡе ҙиіҪдәӢеҪўеӢўпјҢйӮҠе•ІйҰ¬еҸҜд»ҘиіәжӯҘйҖҹпјӣйӮҠе•ІйҰ¬зӣёе°Қиқ•еә•пјҢеӢҷжұӮе№«еӨ§е®¶жҚүжӣҙеӨҡеҶ·йҰ¬гҖӮ

гҖҠз«¶йҰ¬Fact CheckгҖӢдәҰжңүеҸғиіҪйҰ¬иі зҺҮиө°еӢўпјҢз”ұйҡ”жҷҡеҲ°еҚіе ҙпјҢдёҖзӣ®дәҶз„¶пјӣйӣ»и…Ұй җиЁҲиҮЁе ҙеӨ§жҲ¶иҗҪйЈӣйҰ¬пјҢи®“йҰ¬иҝ·иҗҪжіЁеүҚдҪңеҸғиҖғпјҢеўһж·»еӢқз®—гҖӮ

гҖҠз«¶йҰ¬Fact CheckгҖӢе°Үж–јеӮҚжҷҡ6жҷӮ10еҲҶй–Ӣж’ӯпјҢеұҶжҷӮYoutubeеҸҠгҖҠжһңзҮғеҸ°гҖӢжңғе…ЁзЁӢзӣҙж’ӯгҖӮ

жӯӨеӨ–пјҢеҮәй–ҳй җжё¬иө°дҪҚең–з•Җи§ҖзңҫдәҶи§Јд»Ҡе ҙиіҪдәӢеҪўеӢўпјҢйӮҠе•ІйҰ¬еҸҜд»ҘиіәжӯҘйҖҹпјӣйӮҠе•ІйҰ¬зӣёе°Қиқ•еә•пјҢеӢҷжұӮе№«еӨ§е®¶жҚүжӣҙеӨҡеҶ·йҰ¬гҖӮ

zh-HK.description:
и·‘йҰ¬ең°йҰ¬е ҙд»ҠжҷҡпјҲ14ж—ҘпјүдёҠжј”д№қе ҙиіҪдәӢпјҢй ӯе ҙе®ҡж–јеӮҚжҷҡ6жҷӮ45еҲҶй–Ӣи·‘гҖӮ

е‘ЁеӣӣпјҲ15ж—ҘпјүжҳҜе‘ЁдҝҠжЁӮ21жӯІз”ҹж—ҘпјҢзҚІеё«еӮіжҸҗдҫӣдёҚе°‘еҜҰеҠӣеә§йЁҺпјҢдё”зңӢиғҪеҗҰиҙҸйҰ¬жҸҗеүҚиіҖеЈҪпјӣеҸҰеӨ–еӣӣеӨ§иҸҜеҖүеҫҗйӣЁзҹігҖҒж–Үе®¶иүҜгҖҒе‘ӮеҒҘеЁҒеҸҠзҫ…еҜҢе…Ёиҝ‘жңҹжҲ°зёҫеҪӘзӮідёҚеҒңиҙҸйҰ¬пјҢд»ҠжңҹеҠӣзҲӯе»¶зәҢеӢқзәңгҖӮ

иҳӢжһңгҖҠз«¶йҰ¬Fact CheckгҖӢеұҶжҷӮзӣҙж’ӯеҗ„е ҙиіҪдәӢпјҢи®“йҰ¬иҝ·зҢ¶еҰӮзҪ®иә«е ҙе…§зқҮи·‘йҰ¬гҖӮ

дё»жҢҒжңғеҲҶжһҗеҗ„е»җжҲ°йҰ¬ж©ҹжңғпјҢй…ҚеҗҲеҗ„е ҙйҰ¬еҢ№иіҪзёҫгҖҒй«”йҮҚи®ҠеҢ–гҖҒдәәйҰ¬еҗҲдҪңзӯүзөұиЁҲиіҮж–ҷпјҢдёҖиЎЁзқҮжҷ’пјҢж–№дҫҝеҲЁйҰ¬гҖӮ

гҖҠз«¶йҰ¬Fact CheckгҖӢд»ҠеӯЈж–°еўһAIжЁЎж“¬иіҪжһңпјҢйӣҶеҗ„й …dataйҖІиЎҢйҒӢз®—пјҢиӯҳеҲҘеҮәе“ӘдәӣжҳҜж©ҹжңғйҰ¬пјҢд»Ҙеҫ—еҲҶй«ҳдҪҺжҺ’еәҸпјҢдёҖзӣ®дәҶз„¶пјҒ

дё»жҢҒдәҰжңғеҚіе ҙи§Јзӯ”и®ҖиҖ…з•ҷиЁҖпјҢиҲҮи®ҖиҖ…дә’еӢ•дәӨжөҒпјӣеҸҰеӨ–жңғеҠ жҸ’йЁҺз·ҙиіҪеүҚиЁӘе•ҸпјҢеӨ§е®¶жҲ–иҖ…еҫһдёӯеҸҜд»ҘжҗөеҲ°ж–№еҗ‘гҖӮ

жӯӨеӨ–пјҢеҮәй–ҳй җжё¬иө°дҪҚең–з•Җи§ҖзңҫдәҶи§Јд»Ҡе ҙиіҪдәӢеҪўеӢўпјҢйӮҠе•ІйҰ¬еҸҜд»ҘиіәжӯҘйҖҹпјӣйӮҠе•ІйҰ¬зӣёе°Қиқ•еә•пјҢеӢҷжұӮе№«еӨ§е®¶жҚүжӣҙеӨҡеҶ·йҰ¬гҖӮ

гҖҠз«¶йҰ¬Fact CheckгҖӢдәҰжңүеҸғиіҪйҰ¬иі зҺҮиө°еӢўпјҢз”ұйҡ”жҷҡеҲ°еҚіе ҙпјҢдёҖзӣ®дәҶз„¶пјӣйӣ»и…Ұй җиЁҲиҮЁе ҙеӨ§жҲ¶иҗҪйЈӣйҰ¬пјҢи®“йҰ¬иҝ·иҗҪжіЁеүҚдҪңеҸғиҖғпјҢеўһж·»еӢқз®—гҖӮ

гҖҠз«¶йҰ¬Fact CheckгҖӢе°Үж–јеӮҚжҷҡ6жҷӮ10еҲҶй–Ӣж’ӯпјҢеұҶжҷӮYoutubeеҸҠгҖҠжһңзҮғеҸ°гҖӢжңғе…ЁзЁӢзӣҙж’ӯгҖӮ

snippet.description:
Please  subscribe to гҖҗжқҺеӯҗжҹ’ Liziqi гҖ‘Liziqi Channel on YouTube if you like my videos: https://goo.gl/nkjpSx 
#жқҺеӯҗжҹ’#Liziqi#lГҪtб»ӯthбәҘ#ChineseCuisine #ChineseFood
 гҖҗжқҺеӯҗжҹ’ Liziqi гҖ‘ https://goo.gl/nkjpSx
--------------------------------------------------------------------
Make a peach blossom crown with silk flowers, and catch the spring breeze with my dear Granny.

жңҖиҝ‘и·ҹеҺ»е№ҙиҝҮе®Ңе№ҙдёҖж ·пјҢжҗҒе®¶йҮҢеҝҷжҳҘз§ҚжқҘзқҖгҖӮ
еӣ дёәжғіиҮӘе·ұеҒҡеҸ‘йҘ°жӢҚз…§жүҖд»ҘжңүдәҶиҝҷдёӘи§Ҷйў‘
з”Ёзңҹдёқеёғж–ҷеҒҡдәҶдәӣвҖңз»ўиҠұвҖқе·Ҙиүәзҡ„жұүжңҚйҘ°е“Ғ
и¶ҒзқҖжҳҘиүІжӯЈеҘҪпјҢжЎғиҠұжј«еұұ
еёҰдёҠиҖҒдәәе®¶еҺ»еҘ№дёҖзӣҙжғіеҺ»зҡ„ең°ж–№еҒҡдҪңзҡ„жөӘдәҶжөӘ
дәҶдәҶеҝөжғі
As a spring ritual after the new year, IвҖҷve been busy sowing recently back at home.
In the mood for some hand-made hair accessories,
I made these Hanfu ornaments with silk flowers, and had this video shot.
In this pretty spring, when peach blossoms dye the mountain,
take my dear lady to the place full of memory, where all is found,
and tick yet another one from her wish list.

snippet.title: Kutty Pattas Music Video | Ashwin | Reba John | Venki | Santhosh Dhayanidhi | Sandy
snippet.description:
A brilliantly vivid splash of colours and a wildly fun #KuttyPattas composed by the Raati fame #SanthoshDhayanidhi featuring the most exciting cast one could ask for! Is there a better way to head into the weekend? #Ashwin, the current darling of Tamil Television features alongside the stunningly beautiful #RebaJohn in this groovy music video directed by #Venky and choreographed by #Sandy. Watch it here and bring out the moves ! 

Stream now - https://SMI.lnk.to/KuttyPattas

Song - Kutty Pattas
Composed by - Santhosh Dhayanidhi
Featuring - Ashwin Kumar, Reba Monica John
Sung by - Santhosh Dhayanidhi, Rakshita Suresh
Lyrics - A.Pa Raja
Directed by - Venki
Cinematography - Harish Kannan
Choreography - Sandy Master
Set - Amaran
Editing - Krishna Kumar
DI - Suresh Ravi

snippet.title: Prince Harry Preparing to Return to UK for Duke of Edinburgh's Funeral
snippet.description:
Prince Harry is expected to return to the UK for his grandfather, Prince Philip's funeral.

The Duke of Sussex is making preparations to fly back from his US home, though it was unclear whether his wife, Meghan Markle, or son, Archie, would be returning with him.

It is expected the Duke will be buried in Frogmore Gardens, following a small family service at St George's Chapel in the grounds of Windsor Castle. 

#PrinceHarry #PrincePhilip #RoyalFamily
tags: duke of edinburgh becomes prince philip

snippet.title: HIGHLIGHTS | Leicester 0-2 Man City | MENDY & JESUS
snippet.description:
City moved to within 11 points of a third Premier League title in four years with a flawless 2-0 win over high-flying Leicester.
Dominating from start to finish, Pep Guardiola's side are now 17 points clear of second-place Manchester United with goals from Benjamin Mendy and Gabriel Jesus the reward for a commanding display at the King Power Stadium.

READ THE MATCH REPORT HERE: https://www.mancity.com/news/mens/leicester-city-0-2-manchester-city-match-report-3-april-2021-63753063

Pep speaks to the press ahead of tomorrow's trip to the King Power!

snippet.title: иіҪйҰ¬зӣҙж’ӯпҪңз«¶йҰ¬Fact Check Liveзӣҙж’ӯ2021-04-11 еҚҒдёҖе ҙHKJCйҰҷжёҜиіҪйҰ¬жңғжІҷз”°иҚүең°ж—ҘйҰ¬ еҚіе ҙиІјеЈ« AIжЁЎж“¬иіҪжһң жҺ’йҡҠйҰ¬ | иҳӢжһңж—Ҙе ұ Apple Daily
snippet.description:
йҖҷеӨ©пјҲ11ж—ҘпјүжІҷз”°йҰ¬е ҙдёҠжј”еҚҒдёҖе ҙиҚүең°ж—ҘиіҪпјҢй ӯе ҙе®ҡж–јдёӢеҚҲ12жҷӮ30еҲҶй–Ӣи·‘гҖӮ

иҳӢжһңгҖҠз«¶йҰ¬Fact CheckгҖӢеұҶжҷӮзӣҙж’ӯеҗ„е ҙиіҪдәӢпјҢи®“йҰ¬иҝ·зҢ¶еҰӮзҪ®иә«е ҙе…§зқҮи·‘йҰ¬гҖӮ

зҫ…еҜҢе…ЁеҸҠе‘ӮеҒҘеЁҒе…©еӨ§иҸҜзұҚеҖүдё»е·ІйҖЈиҙҸдёүеҖӢиіҪж—ҘпјҢд»Ҡж¬ЎдәҢдәәеҲҶеҲҘеҮәйҰ¬д№қеҢ№еҸҠеҚҒеҢ№пјҢиіӘйҮҸе…јеӮҷпјҢжңүж¬Ҡе»¶зәҢеӢқзәңгҖӮ

еҸҰеӨ–й ӯе ҙж–°йҰ¬иіҪпјҢзұійӣӘеҖӢдәәеҗҚдёӢйҰ–еҢ№иіҪй§’гҖҢиҹІиҚүжҲҗеҗҚгҖҚзІүеўЁзҷ»е ҙпјҢзқҮеҗ“жңғе””жңғдёҖйіҙй©ҡдәәгҖӮ

гҖҠз«¶йҰ¬Fact CheckгҖӢжҸҗдҫӣAIжЁЎж“¬иіҪжһңпјҢйӣҶеҗ„й …dataйҖІиЎҢйҒӢз®—пјҢиӯҳеҲҘеҮәе“ӘдәӣжҳҜж©ҹжңғйҰ¬пјҢд»Ҙеҫ—еҲҶй«ҳдҪҺжҺ’еәҸпјҢдёҖзӣ®дәҶз„¶пјҒ

дё»жҢҒдәҰжңғеҚіе ҙи§Јзӯ”и®ҖиҖ…з•ҷиЁҖпјҢиҲҮи®ҖиҖ…дә’еӢ•дәӨжөҒпјӣеҸҰеӨ–жңғеҠ жҸ’йЁҺз·ҙиіҪеүҚиЁӘе•ҸпјҢеӨ§е®¶жҲ–иҖ…еҫһдёӯеҸҜд»ҘжҗөеҲ°ж–№еҗ‘гҖӮ

жӯӨеӨ–пјҢе°ҮжңүеҮәй–ҳй җжё¬иө°дҪҚең–пјҢзӯүи§ҖзңҫдәҶи§Јд»Ҡе ҙиіҪдәӢеҪўеӢўпјҢйӮҠе•ІйҰ¬еҸҜд»ҘиіәжӯҘйҖҹпјӣйӮҠе•ІйҰ¬зӣёе°Қиқ•еә•пјҢеӢҷжұӮе№«еӨ§е®¶жҚүжӣҙеӨҡеҶ·йҰ¬гҖӮ

гҖҠз«¶йҰ¬Fact CheckгҖӢиЁӯжңүеҸғиіҪйҰ¬иі зҺҮиө°еӢўпјҢз”ұйҡ”жҷҡеҲ°еҚіе ҙпјҢдёҖзӣ®дәҶз„¶пјӣйӣ»и…Ұй җиЁҲиҮЁе ҙеӨ§жҲ¶иҗҪйЈӣйҰ¬пјҢи®“йҰ¬иҝ·иҗҪжіЁеүҚдҪңеҸғиҖғпјҢеўһж·»еӢқз®—гҖӮ

гҖҠз«¶йҰ¬Fact CheckгҖӢе°Үж–јдёҠеҚҲ11жҷӮ55еҲҶй–Ӣж’ӯпјҢеұҶжҷӮYoutubeеҸҠгҖҠжһңзҮғеҸ°гҖӢйғҪжңғе…ЁзЁӢзӣҙж’ӯгҖӮ

гҖҗзҷҢеҰ»з–‘и…«зҳӨеўһеӨ§еҶҚе…ҘйҷўгҖ‘жһ—еӯҗеҚҡеҝғеҠӣдәӨзҳҒ ж„ҹжҝҖжұӘйҳҝе§җе ұзҙҷеҢ…йҢўзӣёиҙҲжёЎйӣЈй—ңпјҲеЈ№йҖұеҲҠ Nextпјү(https://youtu.be/gk83T58fTIs)

гҖҗж·ұж°ҙеҹ—е…©йӨёйЈҜгҖ‘59жӯІеӨ§еҸ”иіЈ$32е…©йӨёйЈҜ жңҲжҙҫ100д»ҪйҖҒй•·иҖ… з”ұеҸ°зҒЈжҙҫеҲ°йҰҷжёҜпјҡеҸ—йҒҺжёҜдәәжҒ©жғ жғіеӣһйҘӢ (йЈІйЈҹз”·еҘі Apple Daily) (https://youtu.be/kyvNU86ntio)

zh-HK.title: иіҪйҰ¬зӣҙж’ӯпҪңз«¶йҰ¬Fact Check Liveзӣҙж’ӯ2021-04-11 еҚҒдёҖе ҙHKJCйҰҷжёҜиіҪйҰ¬жңғжІҷз”°иҚүең°ж—ҘйҰ¬ еҚіе ҙиІјеЈ« AIжЁЎж“¬иіҪжһң жҺ’йҡҠйҰ¬ | иҳӢжһңж—Ҙе ұ Apple Daily
zh-HK.description:
йҖҷеӨ©пјҲ11ж—ҘпјүжІҷз”°йҰ¬е ҙдёҠжј”еҚҒдёҖе ҙиҚүең°ж—ҘиіҪпјҢй ӯе ҙе®ҡж–јдёӢеҚҲ12жҷӮ30еҲҶй–Ӣи·‘гҖӮ

иҳӢжһңгҖҠз«¶йҰ¬Fact CheckгҖӢеұҶжҷӮзӣҙж’ӯеҗ„е ҙиіҪдәӢпјҢи®“йҰ¬иҝ·зҢ¶еҰӮзҪ®иә«е ҙе…§зқҮи·‘йҰ¬гҖӮ

зҫ…еҜҢе…ЁеҸҠе‘ӮеҒҘеЁҒе…©еӨ§иҸҜзұҚеҖүдё»е·ІйҖЈиҙҸдёүеҖӢиіҪж—ҘпјҢд»Ҡж¬ЎдәҢдәәеҲҶеҲҘеҮәйҰ¬д№қеҢ№еҸҠеҚҒеҢ№пјҢиіӘйҮҸе…јеӮҷпјҢжңүж¬Ҡе»¶зәҢеӢқзәңгҖӮ

еҸҰеӨ–й ӯе ҙж–°йҰ¬иіҪпјҢзұійӣӘеҖӢдәәеҗҚдёӢйҰ–еҢ№иіҪй§’гҖҢиҹІиҚүжҲҗеҗҚгҖҚзІүеўЁзҷ»е ҙпјҢзқҮеҗ“жңғе””жңғдёҖйіҙй©ҡдәәгҖӮ

гҖҠз«¶йҰ¬Fact CheckгҖӢжҸҗдҫӣAIжЁЎж“¬иіҪжһңпјҢйӣҶеҗ„й …dataйҖІиЎҢйҒӢз®—пјҢиӯҳеҲҘеҮәе“ӘдәӣжҳҜж©ҹжңғйҰ¬пјҢд»Ҙеҫ—еҲҶй«ҳдҪҺжҺ’еәҸпјҢдёҖзӣ®дәҶз„¶пјҒ

дё»жҢҒдәҰжңғеҚіе ҙи§Јзӯ”и®ҖиҖ…з•ҷиЁҖпјҢиҲҮи®ҖиҖ…дә’еӢ•дәӨжөҒпјӣеҸҰеӨ–жңғеҠ жҸ’йЁҺз·ҙиіҪеүҚиЁӘе•ҸпјҢеӨ§е®¶жҲ–иҖ…еҫһдёӯеҸҜд»ҘжҗөеҲ°ж–№еҗ‘гҖӮ

жӯӨеӨ–пјҢе°ҮжңүеҮәй–ҳй җжё¬иө°дҪҚең–пјҢзӯүи§ҖзңҫдәҶи§Јд»Ҡе ҙиіҪдәӢеҪўеӢўпјҢйӮҠе•ІйҰ¬еҸҜд»ҘиіәжӯҘйҖҹпјӣйӮҠе•ІйҰ¬зӣёе°Қиқ•еә•пјҢеӢҷжұӮе№«еӨ§е®¶жҚүжӣҙеӨҡеҶ·йҰ¬гҖӮ

гҖҠз«¶йҰ¬Fact CheckгҖӢиЁӯжңүеҸғиіҪйҰ¬иі зҺҮиө°еӢўпјҢз”ұйҡ”жҷҡеҲ°еҚіе ҙпјҢдёҖзӣ®дәҶз„¶пјӣйӣ»и…Ұй җиЁҲиҮЁе ҙеӨ§жҲ¶иҗҪйЈӣйҰ¬пјҢи®“йҰ¬иҝ·иҗҪжіЁеүҚдҪңеҸғиҖғпјҢеўһж·»еӢқз®—гҖӮ

гҖҠз«¶йҰ¬Fact CheckгҖӢе°Үж–јдёҠеҚҲ11жҷӮ55еҲҶй–Ӣж’ӯпјҢеұҶжҷӮYoutubeеҸҠгҖҠжһңзҮғеҸ°гҖӢйғҪжңғе…ЁзЁӢзӣҙж’ӯгҖӮ

snippet.title: EVERTON 1-1 CRYSTAL PALACE | PREMIER LEAGUE HIGHLIGHTS
snippet.description:
James Rodriguez scored on his return to action to put Everton ahead against Crystal Palace, but the Blues were made to pay for missed chances as Michy Batshuayi levelled late on. The game also saw the return of Jean-Philippe Gbamin, who has been sidelined with injury for 597 days.

Subscribe to Everton Football Club's official YouTube Channel: http://bit.ly/2wtCEbB

Follow us on Facebook: http://facebook.com/everton
Follow us on Twitter: http://twitter.com/everton

snippet.title: Prince Philip dies: Queen faces a future without her вҖҳstrength and stayвҖҷ | ITV News
snippet.description:
After over 70 years with him by her side, Queen Elizabeth must now face a future without Philip, the man she once honoured as her "strength and stay", the longest serving royal consort in British history.вҖҜ 

Elizabeth II has become the first reigning widow monarch since Queen Victoria, who was so devastated by the death of Prince Albert, she withdrew almost entirely from public life for 40 years and become known as the вҖҳWidow of WindsorвҖҷ.

snippet.title: HARI BAHHAGIA - ATTA Halilintar & AUREL Hermansyah - ( OFFICIAL MUSIC VIDEO)
snippet.description:
Listen Hari Bahhagia : 
https://lnk.to/HariBahhagia

*
Di sela kesibukannya meyiapkan hari pernikahan, Atta Halilintar dan Aurel Hermansyah membuat kejutan dengan single terbaru mereka berjudul HARI BAHHAGIA. Lagu yang terinspirasi dari kisah perjalanan mereka mulai dari masa bahagia, hingga masa sulit tertuang dalam lagu tersebut.

 вҖңAku kepengin banget menceritakan kisah cinta ini untuk Aurel. Dan kayaknya menyampaikan lewat lagu sudah pas sekali. Awalnya, ini lagu hanya dari aku untuk Aurel, bukan direncanakan untuk duet,вҖқ jelas Atta.

 Memang benar. Awal mula single ini hanyalah ungkapan perasaan bahagia dan syukur Atta, karena akan bersama Aurel dalam ikatan pernikahan. Dan ini tadinya merupakan kado rahasia yang disiapkan Atta untuk Aurel. Ketika Atta memberikan lagu itu untuk Aurel untuk di dengarkan, ia pun ingin berduet menyanyikannya bareng dengan Atta. Alhasil, lagu yang sudah jadi pun dirombak sebagai lagu duet.

*
Credit Music :
Song Producer : Atta Halilintar
Song composer : Atta Halilintar, Gibran Prio Adihutomo, Leztey
Aranger : Leztey
Music & Lyric : Atta Halilintar, Gibran Prio Adihutomo, Leztey
Vocal Directed by : Gibran Prio Adihutomo, Metha Zulia
Vocal Recorded at : Atta Music Studio
Vocal Audio Angineered by : Leztey
Mixed & Mastered : Leztey

*
Credit Music Video : 
Executive Producer : Atta Halilintar
Produced by : Satria Kinayungan
Directed by : Upie Guava
Co-Director by : Tb Elvan
Edited by : Upie Guava, Tb Elvan
Gaffer by : Wan Black

*
Outfits: Valentino, Marks and Spencer, Julianto, SAS designs
Accessories: Rinaldy Yunardi
Fashion Stylist: Erich Al Amin

snippet.title: Kourtney & Addison Bunker Down: "KUWTK" Katch-Up (S20, Ep4) | E!

snippet.title: Ungu & Lesti - Bismillah Cinta | Official Music Video
snippet.description:
Ungu & Lesti - Bismillah Cinta | Official Music Video

Ungu kembali dengan single baru. Karya baru ini adalah single religi bertajuk вҖңBismillah CintaвҖқ yang juga berkolaborasi dengan penyanyi dangdut muda, Lesti Kejora.

Kolaborasi ini adalah sesuatu yang fresh untuk band yang digawangi oleh Pasha (vokalis), Makki (bass), Enda (gitar), Oncy (gitar), serta Rowman (drum) dan juga Lesti. Ini kedua kalinya Ungu berkolaborasi dengan penyanyi dangdut setelah sebelumnya bersama Iis Dahlia di lagu вҖңHampa HatikuвҖқ (2012). Sedangkan ini adalah kali pertama bagi Lesti berkolaborasi dengan band dalam sebuah lagu.

вҖңBismillah CintaвҖқ ditulis oleh Pasha, vokalis Ungu. Ada tiga pesan di dalamnya, yakni tentang kebahagiaan para umat Muslim akan kehadiran bulan Ramadhan, tentang pandemi yang membatasi banyak hal, dan hubungan cinta jarak jauh. Namun, karena keyakinan yang kuat, keduanya sama-sama berjuang untuk melewati ujian yang ada.

вҖңLagu ini adalah lagu religi yang ringan dan mudah dipahami. Pesannya jelas, nuansa Ramadhan-nya sangat kuat. Menulis lagu ini pun tidak membutuhkan waktu lama. Suara Lesti mewarnai lagu ini dan memberikan satu nilai lebih. Semoga вҖңBismillah CintaвҖқ bisa menghibur dan memberikan semangat baru bagi mereka yang mendengarkan lagunya, terutama para pecinta musik Lesti dan Ungu,вҖқ ujar Pasha mewakili Ungu.

Untuk video musiknya, Ungu dan Lesti melakukan shooting bersama. Namun, secara terpisah. Hal ini dikarenakan lagu yang mereka bawakan bernuansa religi dan mewakili cerita lagu yang mengisahkan hubungan jarak jauh.

вҖңSemua orang bisa menyanyikan вҖңBismillah CintaвҖқ dan dan menikmatinya. Semoga setelah mendengarkan вҖңBismillah CintaвҖқ, ada hikmah positif untuk kehidupan kita. Semoga banyak yang senang dengan вҖңBismillah CintaвҖқ, lagunya meledak, dan menjadi sejarah baru,вҖқ kata Lesti. 

вҖңDalam rangka bulan Ramadhan 1442 H, Indosiar telah mempersiapkan Mega Seri Ramadhan terbaik berjudul вҖңBismillah CintaвҖқ produksi MKF yang diperankan oleh Ali Syakieb dan Margin Wierheerm. Mereka adalah pasangan artis suami istri yang baru pertama kali bermain bersama dalam satu judul. Di saat bersamaan, Ungu yang comeback ke industri musik Indonesia akan berkolaborasi dengan Lesti DAA, penyanyi dangdut yang sedang bersinar terang dan menjadi kesayangan seluruh masyarakat Indonesia. Lalu, terciptalah lagu religi вҖңBismillah CintaвҖқ ciptaan Pasha Ungu yang indah, megah, dan sangat sempurna dinyanyikan oleh Lesti DAA  dan Ungu. Kolaborasi ini merupakan yang pertama kali dan dipersiapkan khusus sebagai soundtrack mega series вҖңBismillah CintaвҖқ yang akan tayang selama bulan Ramadhan di Indosiar.  Insya Allah, вҖңBismillah CintaвҖқ menjadi lagu religi yang sukses dan disukai oleh seluruh  masyarakat Indonesia. Amin,вҖқ jelas Harsiwi Achmad selaku Direktur Surya Citra Mandiri.

вҖңKolaborasi Ungu dengan Lesti Kejora ini sangat unik karena adanya perbedaan genre di antara mereka. Namun, hal ini menjelaskan sekali bahwa tidak ada batasan untuk berkarya di dunia musik. Semoga fans Ungu dan Lesti termotivasi untuk melakukan hal positif setelah mendengarkan вҖңBismillah CintaвҖқ,вҖқ ucap Yonathan Nugroho, Managing Director Trinity Optima Production.

BISMILLAH CINTA (LIRIK)
TAK DAPAT LAGI KULUKIS RASA
RAMADHAN YANG INDAH KINI TLAH TIBA
BULAN PENUH BERKAH RAHMAT DARI ALLAH
MESKI DALAM SUASANA BERBEDA

COBAAN DEMI COBAAN MELANDA
KITA BERSAMA NAMUN TAK LAGI SMA
JARAK MEMISAHKAN SEMUA TLAH BERBATAS
INI UJIAN BAGI KITA

BISMILLAH CINTA
PERCAYA PADAKU PERCAYA CINTA
YAKIN KITA BISA LALUI SEMUA
SGALA COBAAN YANG DATANG MENDERA

BISMILLAH CINTA
PANJATKAN DOA PADA YANG KUASA
BERSUJUD PADANYA DENGAN AIR MATA
INSYAALLAH RAMADHAN MEMBAWA HIKMAT

BISMILLAH CINTA
PERCAYA KITA
BISMILLAH CINTA
PERCAYA CINTA

snippet.title: Watch live: The Duke of Edinburgh, Prince Philip, has died
snippet.description:
Buckingham Palace has announced that His Royal Highness Prince Philip has died.

The Duke was married to Queen Elizabeth II for more than 70 years and became the longest-serving consort in British history.

His Royal Highness passed away peacefully this morning at Windsor Castle.

localized.title: Watch live: The Duke of Edinburgh, Prince Philip, has died
localized.description:
Buckingham Palace has announced that His Royal Highness Prince Philip has died.

The Duke was married to Queen Elizabeth II for more than 70 years and became the longest-serving consort in British history.

His Royal Highness passed away peacefully this morning at Windsor Castle.

snippet.title: Prince Charles: 'My Dear Papa Was a Very Special Person'
snippet.description:
Prince Charles made a short statement outside Highgrove House this afternoon to mark the passing of his father, the Duke of Edinburgh.

The Prince of Wales commented on his father's seven decades of service to Queen and country. He added that: "My family and I will miss him enormously... My dear Papa was a very special person."

#PrinceCharles #PrincePhilip #RoyalFamily

snippet.description:
жӯЈеёёзҷјжҸ® жҳҜеҖӢ{дёҚжӯЈеёё}зҡ„ж”ҝи«–зҜҖзӣ®

жҲ‘еҖ‘зҪөдәәдёҚеё¶й«’ зі—дәәжІ’еңЁжҖ•

зҠҖеҲ©д№ҹеҘҪ е№Ҫй»ҳд№ҹзҪ·
йӣЈжҗһд№ҹиЎҢ жңүзЁ®жңҖеӨ§

жҲ‘еҖ‘зҡ„иӢӣи–„дёҚеӨӘжӯЈеёё
жҲ‘еҖ‘зҡ„е°–й…ёзӣҙжҲіеҝғиҮҹ 

еңӢе…§ еңӢеӨ– ж”ҝжІ» зӨҫжңғ

иӘ°ж•ўдёҚжӯЈеёё жҲ‘еҖ‘е°ұдёҠиҶӣ

жӯЈеёёзҷјжҸ®дё»ж—Ёз„Ўд»–

е°ұзӣјеҸ°зҒЈжӯЈеёё дё–з•ҢжӯЈеёё

дҪ зҡ„жӯЈеёё жҲ‘дҫҶзҷјжҸ®

вҡ пёҸгҖҢжңӘз¶“и‘—дҪңж¬ҠдәәдәӢе…ҲжӣёйқўеҗҢж„ҸпјҢеӢҝе°Үе…§е®№з”Ёж–је•ҶжҘӯжҖ§иіӘд№ӢеҲҶдә«гҖҒйҖЈзөҗгҖӮгҖҚ
гҖҢеҰӮжңүд»»дҪ•зҮҹжҘӯдҪҝз”ЁпјҢеҝ…й ҲдәӢе…ҲеҸ–еҫ—жӣёйқўеҗҢж„ҸгҖҚ

вҡ пёҸзҜҖзӣ®жӯЈејҸй–Ӣж’ӯеүҚпјҢжңғеҶҚйҖҡзҹҘеӨ§е®¶пјҒ

snippet.title: Space Jam: A New Legacy вҖ“ Trailer 1
snippet.description:
Tunes vs. Goons. Watch LeBron James and Bugs Bunny in the new trailer for Space Jam: A New Legacy. In theaters and streaming on HBO Max вҖ“ July 16. #SpaceJamMovie 

-----------------
https://www.facebook.com/SpaceJamMovieвҖӢ
https://www.instagram.com/SpaceJamMovie/вҖӢ
https://twitter.com/spacejammovie/вҖӢ
-----------------
Welcome to the Jam!  Basketball champion and global icon LeBron James goes on an epic adventure alongside timeless Tune Bugs Bunny with the animated/live-action event вҖңSpace Jam: A New Legacy,вҖқ from director Malcolm D. Lee and an innovative filmmaking team including Ryan Coogler and Maverick Carter.  This transformational journey is a manic mashup of two worlds that reveals just how far some parents will go to connect with their kids. When LeBron and his young son Dom are trapped in a digital space by a rogue A.I., LeBron must get them home safe by leading Bugs, Lola Bunny and the whole gang of notoriously undisciplined Looney Tunes to victory over the A.I.вҖҷs digitized champions on the court: a powered-up roster of professional basketball stars as youвҖҷve never seen them before.  ItвҖҷs Tunes versus Goons in the highest-stakes challenge of his life, that will redefine LeBronвҖҷs bond with his son and shine a light on the power of being yourself. The ready-for-action Tunes destroy convention, supercharge their unique talents and surprise even вҖңKingвҖқ James by playing the game their own way.

James stars alongside Oscar nominee Don Cheadle (the вҖңAvengersвҖқ films, вҖңHotel RwandaвҖқ), Khris Davis (вҖңJudas and the Black Messiah,вҖқ TVвҖҷs вҖңAtlantaвҖқ), Sonequa Martin-Green (TVвҖҷs вҖңThe Walking Dead,вҖқ вҖңStar Trek: DiscoveryвҖқ), newcomer Cedric Joe, Jeff Bergman (вҖңLooney Tunes CartoonsвҖқ), Eric Bauza (вҖңLooney Tunes CartoonsвҖқ), and Zendaya (upcoming вҖңDune,вҖқ вҖңMalcolm & MarieвҖқ).

Lee (вҖңGirls Trip,вҖқ вҖңNight SchoolвҖқ) directs from a screenplay by Juel Taylor & Tony Rettenmaier & Keenan Coogler & Terence Nance.  The filmвҖҷs producers are Ryan Coogler, LeBron James, Maverick Carter and Duncan Henderson, and the executive producers are Sev Ohanian, Zinzi Coogler, Allison Abbate, Jesse Ehrman, Jamal Henderson, Spencer Beighley, Justin Lin, Terence Nance and Ivan Reitman.

The directorвҖҷs behind-the-scenes creative team includes director of photography Salvatore Totino (вҖңSpider-Man: HomecomingвҖқ), animation producer Troy Nethercott (вҖңWonder ParkвҖқ), production designers Kevin Ishioka (вҖңThe MuleвҖқ), Akin McKenzie (NetflixвҖҷs вҖңWhen They See UsвҖқ) and Clint Wallace (upcoming вҖңEternalsвҖқ), editor Bob Ducsay (вҖңGodzilla: King of the Monsters,вҖқ вҖңStar Wars Episode VIII вҖ“ The Last JediвҖқ) and costume designer Melissa Bruning (вҖңRampage,вҖқ вҖңWar for the Planet of the ApesвҖқ).  The music is by Kris Bowers (вҖңGreenbook,вҖқ NetflixвҖҷs вҖңBridgertonвҖқ).

Warner Bros. Pictures Presents a Proximity/The SpringHill Company Production, a Malcolm D. Lee Film, вҖңSpace Jam: A New Legacy.вҖқ  The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures.  It will be released in theaters nationwide on July 16, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.

snippet.title: The Demons Baron Battled | Toni Talks
snippet.description: Talking to Baron made me reflect on my own life, the truth is, we all have done things in the past we are not proud of and we wouldnвҖҷt want to see in the headlines. But the beauty of his story is that no matter how many times you messed up your life, God will always love you and will never look at you the way others do.

snippet.title: Siti Nurhaliza Hadiahkan Lagu AKU CINTA PADAMU Buat Ernie Zakri & Syamel Walaupun Tengah Sarat
snippet.description:
Majlis resepsi Ernie Zakri dan Syamel sememangnya meriah dengan kehadiran rakan artis dan juga para peminat masing-masing yang sama-sama meraikan hari istimewa pasangan ini.

Selain daripada majlis yang sederhana namun terlihat eksklusif itu, kehadiran penyanyi nombor satu negera, Datuk Seri Siti Nurhaliza yang sudah sarat hamil anak kedua juga cukup membuatkan ramai вҖҳhisteriaвҖҷ.

Beliau yang hadir bersama suami tercinta, Datuk Seri Khalid Mohd Jiwa dilihat mengenakan busana bewarna merah jambu telah berdiri dan spontan menyanyikan lagu AKU CINTA PADAMU hadiah buat pasangan pengantin. 

Walaupun usia kandungan sudah menghampiri sembilan bulan, suara Tok Ti masih lagi power dan mendapat sorakan daripada semua yang hadir.

Dapat dilihat wajah gembira pasangan Ernie Zakri dan Syamel yang begitu teruja вҖҳdihadiahkanвҖҷ dendangan lagu yang cukup istimewa buat penyanyi kesayangan ramai itu.

Menerusi media sosial, baik di Twitter ataupun di TikTok, kesemuanya memuji penampilan Datuk Seri Siti Nurhaliza yang begitu humble dan masih power menyampaikan lagu walaupun sedang sarat hamil anak kedua. #SITINURHALIZA #SYAMELERNIE

snippet.title: The Secret of Synchronization
snippet.description:
How does order spontaneously arise out of chaos? This video is sponsored by Kiwico вҖ” go to https://www.kiwico.com/Veritasium50 for 50% off your first month of any crate.

An enormous thanks to Prof. Steven Strogatz вҖ” this video would not have been possible without him. Much of the script-writing was inspired and informed by his wonderful book Sync, and his 2004 TED talk. He is a giant in this field, and has literally written the book on chaos, complexity, and synchronization. It was hard to find a paper in this field that Steven (or one of his students) didn't contribute to. His Podcast "The Joy of X" is wonderful вҖ” please listen and subscribe wherever you get your podcasts https://www.quantamagazine.org/tag/the-joy-of-x

Nicky Case's Amazing Firefly Interactive вҖ” https://ncase.me/fireflies

Great Kuramoto Model Interactive вҖ” https://www.complexity-explorables.org/explorables/ride-my-kuramotocycle

References: 

Strogatz, S. H. (2012). Sync: How order emerges from chaos in the universe, nature, and daily life. Hachette UK. вҖ” https://ve42.co/Sync

Strogatz, S. H. (2000). From Kuramoto to Crawford: exploring the onset of synchronization in populations of coupled oscillators. Physica D: Nonlinear Phenomena, 143(1-4), 1-20. вҖ” https://ve42.co/Strogatz2000

Goldsztein, G. H., Nadeau, A. N., & Strogatz, S. H. (2021). Synchronization of clocks and metronomes: A perturbation analysis based on multiple timescales. Chaos: An Interdisciplinary Journal of Nonlinear Science, 31(2), 023109. вҖ” https://ve42.co/Goldsztein

The Broughton Suspension Bridge and the Resonance Disaster вҖ” https://ve42.co/Broughton

Bennett, M., Schatz, M. F., Rockwood, H., & Wiesenfeld, K. (2002). Huygens's clocks. Proceedings of the Royal Society of London. Series A: Mathematical, Physical and Engineering Sciences, 458(2019), 563-579. вҖ” https://ve42.co/Bennett2002

Pantaleone, J. (2002). Synchronization of metronomes. American Journal of Physics, 70(10), 992-1000. вҖ” https://ve42.co/Pantaleone2002

Kuramoto, Y. (1975). Self-entrainment of a population of coupled non-linear oscillators. In International symposium on mathematical problems in theoretical physics (pp. 420-422). Springer, Berlin, Heidelberg. -- https://ve42.co/Kuramoto1975

Great video by Minute Earth about Tidal Locking and the Moon вҖ” https://ve42.co/MinuteEarth

Strogatz, S. H., Abrams, D. M., McRobie, A., Eckhardt, B., & Ott, E. (2005). Crowd synchrony on the Millennium Bridge. Nature, 438(7064), 43-44. вҖ” https://ve42.co/Strogatz2005

Zhabotinsky, A. M. (2007). Belousov-zhabotinsky reaction. Scholarpedia, 2(9), 1435. вҖ” https://ve42.co/Zhabotinsky2007

Flavio H Fenton et al. (2008) Cardiac arrhythmia. Scholarpedia, 3(7):1665. вҖ” https://ve42.co/Cardiac

Cherry, E. M., & Fenton, F. H. (2008). Visualization of spiral and scroll waves in simulated and experimental cardiac tissue. New Journal of Physics, 10(12), 125016. вҖ” https://ve42.co/Cherry2008

Tyson, J. J. (1994). What everyone should know about the Belousov-Zhabotinsky reaction. In Frontiers in mathematical biology (pp. 569-587). Springer, Berlin, Heidelberg. вҖ” https://ve42.co/Tyson1994

Winfree, A. T. (2001). The geometry of biological time (Vol. 12). Springer Science & Business Media. вҖ” https://ve42.co/Winfree2001

Special thanks to Patreon supporters: Mac Malkawi, Oleksii Leonov, Michael Schneider, Jim Osmun, Tyson McDowell, Ludovic Robillard, jim buckmaster, fanime96, Juan Benet, Ruslan Khroma, Robert Blum, Richard Sundvall, Lee Redden, Vincent, Lyvann Ferrusca, Alfred Wallace, Arjun Chakroborty, Joar Wandborg, Clayton Greenwell, Pindex, Michael Krugman, Cy 'kkm' K'Nelson, Sam Lutfi, Ron Neal

Written by Derek Muller and Petr Lebedev
Animation by Fabio Albertelli and Jakub Misiek
GFX and 3D animation by Jonny Hyman
Filmed by Derek Muller and Raquel Nuno
Edited by Derek Muller
Additional video supplied by Getty Images
Thumbnail by Ignat Berbeci

More footage from NASA's Scientific Visualization Studio

100 metronome video from https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=suxu1bmPm2g

Intro animation by Jorge Cham

Thanks for the BZ footage from SteinbockGroup: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IJn1ssZEyns and 
NileRed https://youtu.be/LL3kVtc-4vY

Animation of waves in the heart from The Virtual Heart/ EM Cherry/ FH Fenton вҖ” https://ve42.co/Cardiac and https://ve42.co/Cherry2008

Chemical materials and protocol provided by Mike Morris and the UCI Chemistry Outreach Program https://www.chem.uci.edu/~jsnowick/outreach/UCI_Outreach/index.html

Thanks to Alie Ward for title/thumbnail consultation
Thanks to Dr Juliette Becker and Dr James O'Donoghue for the planetary science help

Music from Jonny Hyman, Epidemic Sound https://epidemicsound.com "Seaweed" "Deeper Than The Ocean" "Ripple Effect"
Music also from Artlist https://artlist.com "Children of Mystery"

Thumbnail by Ignat Berbeci

snippet.title: гҖҗж„ҡдәәзҜҖзү№еҲҘдјҒеҠғгҖ‘2021.04.01гҖҠеҮ№е—ҡзӢјдәәж®әгҖӢй»ғеҒүжҷүгҖҒйҷійӣ¶д№қв”ӮйӮұйӢ’жҫӨгҖҒе©Ғеі»зў©гҖҒиіҙжҷҸй§’гҖҒйҖёзҘҘгҖҒйӣЁе©·гҖҒзҙҖеҚңеҝғгҖҒзҜ еҙҺжі«гҖҒи–”и–”
snippet.description:
йҖёзҘҘиҒ–з¶“еӨ§жҲ°и–”и–”иө°е®®е»ҹиҰ–и§’+жғЎйқҲйЁҺеЈ«еұҖ
зӢјйҡҠй…ҚзҪ®пјҡжғЎйқҲйЁҺеЈ«+зӢјзҺӢ+е°ҸзӢј
зҘһйҡҠй…ҚзҪ®пјҡй җ+еҘі+зҚө+йЁҺ
вҖ»еҘіе·«е…ЁзЁӢдёҚеҸҜд»ҘиҮӘж•‘
вҖ»жӯӨжқҝеӯҗдҝ®ж”№иҰҸеүҮпјҡзӢјзҺӢеҸҜд»ҘиҮӘзҲҶеё¶дәәгҖӮ

еЁӣзҷҫзүҲжғЎйқҲйЁҺеЈ«иҰҸеүҮпјҡ
1.жғЎйқҲйЁҺеЈ«ж“ҒжңүгҖҢдёҖж¬ЎгҖҚеҸҚеӮ·жҠҖиғҪ-еңЁеӨңжҷҡдёӯиў«й җиЁҖе®¶жҹҘй©—гҖҒиў«еҘіе·«дёӢжҜ’пјҢеүҮи©ІзҘһиҒ·ж·ҳжұ°гҖӮ
2.жғЎйқҲйЁҺеЈ«е°Үж°ёйҒ дёҚжңғжӯ»ж–јеӨңжҷҡгҖӮ
3.иӢҘеӨңжҷҡдёӯеҘіе·«иҲҮй җиЁҖе®¶еҗҢжҜ’еҗҢй©—жғЎйқҲйЁҺеЈ«пјҢеүҮжҳҜеҘіе·«ж·ҳжұ°(еӣ еӨңжҷҡй ҶеәҸзӮәеҘіе·«еңЁе…Ҳ)гҖӮ
4.зҚөдәәиӢҘжӯ»ж–јеӨңжҷҡпјҢй–Ӣж§ҚеҲ°жғЎйқҲйЁҺеЈ«пјҢе°Үз„Ўжі•её¶иө°жғЎйқҲйЁҺеЈ«пјҢдҪҶиӢҘзҚөдәәеңЁзҷҪеӨ©еҮәеұҖеүҮеҸҜеё¶иө°жғЎйқҲйЁҺеЈ«гҖӮ
5.йЁҺеЈ«зҷҪеӨ©й©—иӯүжғЎйқҲйЁҺеЈ«иә«еҲҶпјҢеҸҜжҲҗеҠҹе°ҮжғЎйқҲйЁҺеЈ«ж·ҳжұ°пјҢдёҚжңғиў«еҸҚеӮ·еҪұйҹҝгҖӮ
6.жғЎйқҲйЁҺеЈ«дёҚиғҪиҮӘзҲҶпјҢдёҚиғҪиҮӘеҲҖгҖӮ
7.йҒәиЁҖжҜ”з…§е…ҲеүҚиҰҸеүҮпјҢжҷҡдёҠжӯ»зҡ„еҸӘжңүз¬¬дёҖжҷҡж·ҳжұ°иҖ…зҡ„жңүйҒәиЁҖгҖӮ

snippet.description:

My life's been magic seems fantastic
I used to have a hole in the wall with a mattress
ItвҖҷs funny when you want it
Suddenly you have it
You find out that your goldвҖҷs just plastic

Every day every night
IвҖҷve been thinking back on you and I
Every day every night

I worked my whole life
Just to get right just to be like
Look at me IвҖҷm never coming down

I worked my whole life
Just to get high just to realize
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground
Everything I need is on the ground

Nah but they donвҖҷt hear me though (Yeah what goes up it must come down)
Nah but they donвҖҷt hear me though (YouвҖҷre running out of time)

My worldвҖҷs been hectic seems electric
But IвҖҷve been waking up with your voice in my head
And IвҖҷm trying to send a message
And let you know that every single minute IвҖҷm without you I regret it

Every day every night
IвҖҷve been thinking back on you and I
Every day every night

I worked my whole life
Just to get right just to be like
Look at me IвҖҷm never coming down

Everything I need is on the

Nah but they donвҖҷt hear me though (YouвҖҷre running out of time)

IвҖҷm way up in the clouds
And they say IвҖҷve made it now
But I figured it out
Everything I need is on the ground

Just drove by your house
So far from you now
But I figured it out
Everything I need is on the
Everything I need is on the ground
On the ground

snippet.description:
е“Ҳе“Ҳжһ—еҢ—зөӮж–ји„«жҜӣеёҪжӢҚMVдәҶ! зңӢдәҶйҖҷеҖӢйҖ еһӢзңҹзҡ„еҫҲжғіжү“9жҲ‘иҮӘе·ұрҹҳқ 
рҹҳ’When Namewee gets old & without wearing his beanie...

гҖҠиҖҒдәәзҷЎж„ӣгҖӢе°ҚжҲ‘дҫҶиӘӘжңүдёүй …еӨ§жҢ‘жҲ°гҖӮйҷӨдәҶи„«еёҪеӯҗеҒҡй«®еһӢд№ӢеӨ–пјҢйҖҷз®—жҳҜжҲ‘е°‘ж•ёзҡ„жғ…жӯҢдҪңе“ҒпјҢд№ҹжҳҜжҲ‘жҘөе°‘ж•ёзҡ„зІөиӘһжӯҢжӣІдҪңе“ҒпјҢжҲ‘е·Із¶“зӣЎеҠӣдәҶпјҢеёҢжңӣйҖҷеҖӢжҲҗе“ҒеӨ§е®¶иҒҪеҫ—жҮӮжҲ‘еңЁе”ұд»ҖйәјгҖӮ

ж„ҹи¬қеЎ«и©һдәә йҷіеҶ з„Ҝ Victor ChanпјҢз·ЁжӣІеё« и•ӯе•“иіў Clement SiowпјҢеҘідё»и§’ зҙ…иұҶ DouпјҢз”·дё»и§’ йӯҜж–Үеӯё Lu Wen ShiueпјҢиЈҪдҪңе…¬еҸё е …жҢҒеӨўжғіж–ҮеүөпјҢиЈҪдҪңдәә ејөиіңйәҹ Peter ChongпјҢйӮ„жңүжҜҸдёҖдҪҚеҸғиҲҮзҡ„еҸ°еүҚе№•еҫҢе·ҘдҪңдәәе“ЎгҖӮ
д№ҹи«ӢеӨ§е®¶дёҖе®ҡиҰҒз№јзәҢз•ҷж„ҸжҲ‘еҖ‘зҡ„гҖҠжҙ—и…ҰkжӯҢиЈҪдҪңеӨ§жҸӯз§ҳLet's Make A Hit SongгҖӢпјҒ

-

гҖҗиҖҒдәәзҷЎж„ӣ-з¶Іи·ҜжӯҢе”ұжҜ”иіҪгҖ‘е ұеҗҚжўқд»¶еҸҠж–№ејҸ

1. еҸғиіҪеңҳй«”дёҚйҷҗеңӢзұҚпјҢе№ҙйҪЎпјҢжҖ§еҲҘгҖӮ
2. еҸғиіҪиҖ…еҝ…й Ҳжј”е”ұзІөиӘһеҺҹзүҲзҡ„гҖҗиҖҒдәәзҷЎж„ӣгҖ‘жҲ–иҸҜиӘһзүҲзҡ„гҖҗе–®иә«зӢ—гҖ‘е…¶дёӯдёҖеҖӢгҖӮ
3. еҸғиіҪиҖ…еҸӘйңҖиҮӘиЎҢйҢ„иЈҪе”ұжӯҢеҪұзүҮпјҲдёҚиғҪиӘҝйҹіеҫҢиЈҪиҷ•зҗҶпјүпјҢеҶҚе°ҮеҪұзүҮдёҠеӮіеҲ°YoutubeгҖӮжҠҠйҖЈжҺҘе’ҢеҖӢдәәиіҮж–ҷдҫӢеҰӮе§“еҗҚпјҢжҖ§еҲҘпјҢе№ҙйҪЎпјҢдҫҶиҮӘе“ӘиЈЎпјҢйӮ„жңүйҠҖиЎҢиі¬жҲ¶еҜ„еҲ°д»ҘдёӢзҡ„email [artistemanage.nsp@gmail.comпјҪеҚіеҸҜгҖӮ
4. е ұеҗҚжҲӘжӯўж—ҘжңҹзӮә2021е№ҙ4жңҲ17ж—ҘжҷҡдёҠ11:59:59еүҚгҖӮ
5. еңЁ5жңҲд»ҘеүҚпјҢжҲ‘еҖ‘жңғе°Үе…ҘеңҚзҡ„еҸғиіҪеҪұзүҮе…¬дҪҲи®“з¶Іж°‘жҠ•зҘЁйҒёеҮәеүҚдёүеҗҚе„ӘеӢқиҖ…гҖӮ
6. еүҚдёүеҗҚе„ӘеӢқиҖ…еқҮеҸҜзҚІеҫ—зІҫзҫҺзҚҺзӣғдёҖеә§пјӣеҸҰеӨ–пјҢеҶ и»Қеҫ—дё»еҸҜд»Ҙеҫ—еҲ°500еЎҠзҫҺйҮ‘пјҢдәһи»Қ200зҫҺйҮ‘пјҢеҸҠеӯЈи»Қ100зҫҺйҮ‘зҡ„зҚҺйҮ‘гҖӮ

snippet.title: Thalaivi | Official Trailer (Tamil) | Kangana Ranaut | Arvind Swamy | Vijay | 23rd April
snippet.description:
The superstar heroine, the queen of romance and the one who rose to power despite a patriarchal political system. 
The story we all know, the life story we donвҖҷt know. 
#Thalaivi, Releasing on 23rd April!

Starring Kangana Ranaut, Arvind Swamy, Nassar, Bhagyashree, Samuthrakani, Madhu Bala

Director: Vijay

Producers: Vishnu Vardhan Induri & Shaailesh R Singh

Co Producers: Hitesh Thakkar & Thirumal Reddy

DOP: Vishal Vittal

Music: G.V. Prakash Kumar

Creative Producer: Brinda Prasad
